risk_factors: No communication in 18 days — approaching monitor threshold
EP release in 66 days — timeline pressure increasing
positive_signals: Artist initiated last contact (good sign of engagement)
health.check_in_message: Hey Nova — hope the post-mastering glow is treating you well. Wanted to touch base on a few things: artwork timeline for Soft Machines, and whether you've had any thoughts on the Glass Horizon video. No rush on details — just want to make sure we're aligned before April. Let me know when you've got 15 minutes this week.
health.recommended_action: Schedule a 15-minute call this week to align on pre-release timeline. Relationship is healthy but regular contact becomes critical as release window approaches.
